_meta.title: Soldut — Lightning smoke (4-step SDXL with Lightning LoRA)
_meta.description: Fast smoke test using ByteDance SDXL Lightning 4-step LoRA. Same SDXL base + VAE; LoRA at strength 1.0; KSampler with steps=4, cfg=1.5 (Lightning needs low cfg), sampler=euler, scheduler=sgm_uniform. Should produce a 768x768 image in 20-40s on RTX 2080 vs 5+ min for full sampling.
